'''鈭歽-g-zh''' ('''yagazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulture|vulture]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-g-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulture|vulture]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-g-zh
|-
! Lemma
| yagazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yagazhithi|yagazhithi]] || [[word:yagazhiji|yagazhiji]] || [[word:yagazhishi|yagazhishi]] || [[word:yagazhi|yagazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yagazhuthuth|yagazhuthuth]] || [[word:yagazhujuj|yagazhujuj]] || [[word:yagazhushush|yagazhushush]] || [[word:yagazh|yagazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yagazhuthu|yagazhuthu]] || [[word:yagazhuju|yagazhuju]] || [[word:yagazhushu|yagazhushu]] || [[word:yagazhu|yagazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yagazhufuth|yagazhufuth]] || [[word:yagazhufuj|yagazhufuj]] || [[word:yagazhufush|yagazhufush]] || [[word:yagazhuf|yagazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yagazhethe|yagazhethe]] || [[word:yagazheje|yagazheje]] || [[word:yagazheshe|yagazheshe]] || [[word:yagazhe|yagazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yagazhothoth|yagazhothoth]] || [[word:yagazhojoj|yagazhojoj]] || [[word:yagazhoshosh|yagazhoshosh]] || [[word:yagazh|yagazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yagazhotho|yagazhotho]] || [[word:yagazhojo|yagazhojo]] || [[word:yagazhosho|yagazhosho]] || [[word:yagazho|yagazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yagazhofoth|yagazhofoth]] || [[word:yagazhofoj|yagazhofoj]] || [[word:yagazhofosh|yagazhofosh]] || [[word:yagazhof|yagazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yagazh忙th忙|yagazh忙th忙]] || [[word:yagazh忙j忙|yagazh忙j忙]] || [[word:yagazh忙sh忙|yagazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:yagazh忙|yagazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yagazhathath|yagazhathath]] || [[word:yagazhajaj|yagazhajaj]] || [[word:yagazhashash|yagazhashash]] || [[word:yagazh|yagazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yagazhatha|yagazhatha]] || [[word:yagazhaja|yagazhaja]] || [[word:yagazhasha|yagazhasha]] || [[word:yagazha|yagazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yagazhafath|yagazhafath]] || [[word:yagazhafaj|yagazhafaj]] || [[word:yagazhafash|yagazhafash]] || [[word:yagazhaf|yagazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yagazhasha|yagazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyagazhasha|goyagazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyagazhasha|gokiyagazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yagazhn眉sha|yagazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyagazhnkn眉sha|goyagazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyagazhn眉sha|gokiyagazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yagazhsh毛sha|yagazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyagazhnksh毛sha|goyagazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyagazhsh毛sha|gokiyagazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yagazhrosha|yagazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyagazhnkrosha|goyagazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyagazhrosha|gokiyagazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yagazhmusha|yagazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyagazhnkmusha|goyagazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyagazhmusha|gokiyagazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yagazhsherasha|yagazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyagazhnksherasha|goyagazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyagazhsherasha|gokiyagazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yagazhngasha|yagazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyagazhnkngasha|goyagazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyagazhngasha|gokiyagazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yagazhyasha|yagazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyagazhnkyasha|goyagazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyagazhyasha|gokiyagazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yagazhyamasha|yagazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyagazhnkyamasha|goyagazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyagazhyamasha|gokiyagazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yagazhn眉sh毛sha|yagazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyagazhnkn眉sh毛sha|goyagazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyagazhn眉sh毛sha|gokiyagazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yagazhn眉rosha|yagazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyagazhnkn眉rosha|goyagazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyagazhn眉rosha|gokiyagazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yagazhn眉musha|yagazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyagazhnkn眉musha|goyagazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyagazhn眉musha|gokiyagazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yagazhsh毛n眉sha|yagazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyagazhnksh毛n眉sha|goyagazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyagazhsh毛n眉sha|gokiyagazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yagazhsh毛rosha|yagazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyagazhnksh毛rosha|goyagazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyagazhsh毛rosha|gokiyagazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yagazhsh毛musha|yagazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyagazhnksh毛musha|goyagazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyagazhsh毛musha|gokiyagazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yagazhron眉sha|yagazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyagazhnkron眉sha|goyagazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyagazhron眉sha|gokiyagazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yagazhrosh毛sha|yagazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyagazhnkrosh毛sha|goyagazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyagazhrosh毛sha|gokiyagazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yagazhromusha|yagazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyagazhnkromusha|goyagazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyagazhromusha|gokiyagazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yagazhmun眉sha|yagazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyagazhnkmun眉sha|goyagazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyagazhmun眉sha|gokiyagazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yagazhmush毛sha|yagazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyagazhnkmush毛sha|goyagazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyagazhmush毛sha|gokiyagazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yagazhmurosha|yagazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyagazhnkmurosha|goyagazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyagazhmurosha|gokiyagazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yagazh|yagazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:y忙g忙zh|y忙g忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyagazh|hoyagazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoy忙g忙zh|hoy忙g忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyagazh|hohoyagazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoy忙g忙zh|hohoy忙g忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉yagazh|n眉yagazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉y忙g忙zh|n眉y忙g忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉yagazh|n眉n眉yagazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉y忙g忙zh|n眉n眉y忙g忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂yagazh|n茂yagazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂y忙g忙zh|n茂y忙g忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂yagazh|n茂n茂yagazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂y忙g忙zh|n茂n茂y忙g忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyagazh|luyagazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luy忙g忙zh|luy忙g忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyagazh|luluyagazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluy忙g忙zh|luluy忙g忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyagazh|liyagazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liy忙g忙zh|liy忙g忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyagazh|liliyagazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliy忙g忙zh|liliy忙g忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyagazh|koyagazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koy忙g忙zh|koy忙g忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyagazh|kokoyagazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoy忙g忙zh|kokoy忙g忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyagazh|keyagazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:key忙g忙zh|key忙g忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyagazh|kekeyagazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekey忙g忙zh|kekey忙g忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
